tier_note: SCREEN tier: real NYS parcel/assessment data; density and value figures are published assumptions pending town-hall zoning verification. Not underwritten like NYC.

assumptions.density_note: Est. units assume ~20/acre multifamily density IF zoning allows or can be obtained — VERIFY at town hall; this is a screen, not an entitlement analysis.
assumptions.note: Suburban tier: parcel + assessment screen on real NYS data. No zoning-grade underwriting is claimed.
